ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "career_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the player started their professional career */,
  "career_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the player ended their professional career (if applicable) */,
  "current_rank" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the player */,
  "handicap" REAL /* Handicap of the player */,
  "player_bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the player */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle for the player */,
  "sponsor" TEXT /* Primary sponsor of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "handicap_index" REAL /* Handicap index for the player */,
  "professional_status" TEXT /* Current professional status (e.g., active, retired) */,
  "number_of_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of tournament wins */,
  "number_of_top_10_finishes" INTEGER /* Total number of top 10 finishes */,
  "longest_win_streak" INTEGER /* Longest win streak in terms of tournaments */,
  "career_earnings" REAL /* Total career earnings in USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "total_prize_money" REAL /* Total prize money for the tournament */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of tournament (e.g., major, regular) */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the tournament organizer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the tournament */,
  "number_of_rounds" INTEGER /* Number of rounds in the tournament */,
  "cut_rule" TEXT /* Rule for the cut (e.g., top 70 and ties) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the tournament */,
  "spectator_count" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "course_layout" TEXT /* Detailed layout of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_tournaments" (
  "player_tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's participation in a tournament */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the tournament */,
  "final_position" INTEGER /* Final position of the player in the tournament */,
  "total_strokes" INTEGER /* Total strokes made by the player in the tournament */,
  "total_holes" INTEGER /* Total holes played by the player in the tournament */,
  "scorecard_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's scorecard for the tournament */,
  "total_putts" INTEGER /* Total putts made by the player in the tournament */,
  "fairways_hit" INTEGER /* Number of fairways hit by the player */,
  "greens_in_regulation" INTEGER /* Number of greens in regulation */,
  "bunkers_hit" INTEGER /* Number of times the player hit into a bunker */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Total penalties incurred */,
  "best_round_score" INTEGER /* Best score in any round of the tournament */,
  "worst_round_score" INTEGER /* Worst score in any round of the tournament */,
  "total_driving_distance" INTEGER /* Total driving distance in yards */,
  "sand_save_percentage" REAL /* Sand save percentage */,
  "putting_strokes_gained" REAL /* Putting strokes gained */,
  "approach_strokes_gained" REAL /* Approach strokes gained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournaments_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournaments_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "player_tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's participation in a tournament */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., Front9Par4ScoringAverage) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "stat_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "metric_category" TEXT /* Category of the metric (e.g., putting, driving) */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data (e.g., tournament, practice) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_player_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_tournament_id") REFERENCES player_tournaments ("player_tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the ranking */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number of the ranking */,
  "rank_this_week" INTEGER /* Rank of the player this week */,
  "rank_last_week" INTEGER /* Rank of the player last week */,
  "change_in_rank" INTEGER /* Change in rank from last week */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned in the ranking system */,
  "events_played" INTEGER /* Number of events played in the current week */,
  "money_earned" REAL /* Money earned in the current week */,
  "top_10_finishes" INTEGER /* Number of top 10 finishes in the current week */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins in the current week */,
  "streak" INTEGER /* Current win streak */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number of the data */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the player in the round */,
  "par" INTEGER /* Par of the course in the round */,
  "to_par" INTEGER /* Score relative to par in the round */,
  "position_after_round" INTEGER /* Position of the player after the round */,
  "putts" INTEGER /* Total putts made in the round */,
  "fairways_hit" INTEGER /* Number of fairways hit in the round */,
  "greens_in_regulation" INTEGER /* Number of greens hit in regulation in the round */,
  "bunkers_hit" INTEGER /* Number of times the player hit into a bunker in the round */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Total penalties incurred in the round */,
  "putting_strokes_gained" REAL /* Putting strokes gained in the round */,
  "approach_strokes_gained" REAL /* Approach strokes gained in the round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_details" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each golf course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the golf course */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the golf course */,
  "par" INTEGER /* Par of the golf course */,
  "total_holes" INTEGER /* Total number of holes on the course */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the golf course in yards */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the golf course was established */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the golf course */,
  "green_speed" TEXT /* Speed of the greens (e.g., fast, medium, slow) */,
  "fairway_width" INTEGER /* Width of the fairways in yards */,
  "bunker_count" INTEGER /* Number of bunkers on the course */,
  "water_hazards" INTEGER /* Number of water hazards on the course */,
  "tree_density" TEXT /* Density of trees on the course (e.g., dense, moderate, sparse) */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Annual maintenance cost of the course in USD */,
  "historical_significance" TEXT /* Historical significance of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_courses" (
  "tournament_course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament-course relationship */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the golf course */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number of the tournament played on the course */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the round was played */,
  "tee_time" TEXT /* Tee time for the round */,
  "course_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions of the course for the round */,
  "spectator_access" TEXT /* Access level for spectators (e.g., general, VIP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_courses_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES course_details ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_courses_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)
